title: PortfolioMint
overview: A professional portfolio generator that transforms CV and profile data into stunning, shareable personal websites with multiple themes, live preview, static export, and custom domain support.
features: Instant generation — auto-populates portfolio sections using CVStack resume data
10 themes — Professional, Minimal, Developer, Creative, Executive, Academic, Startup, Elegant, Bold, Dark
100 template variations — each theme has multiple layout options
Live preview — real-time preview within the builder or JobMint dashboard
Section management — Hero, About, Experience, Projects, Skills, Education, Contact sections
Static export — clean HTML/CSS/JS bundle, no framework lock-in, host anywhere
Shareable links — hosted URL for recruiters via URL-encoded state
Responsive design — every template is mobile-first and responsive
Color customization — full color palette control per theme
JobMint integration — auto-syncs with latest CVStack resume data via postMessage
challenges: Designing a theme engine that supports 10 distinct visual identities with 100 template variations while maintaining responsive design across all breakpoints. Generating clean, framework-free HTML/CSS/JS exports that look identical to the live preview.
outcome: A portfolio generator that turns resume data into a professional personal website in minutes, available standalone and as a module within the JobMint ecosystem.
